content.hint: 当确认物品齐全时，使用礼貌且肯定的表达方式

options: I don't know how many there are.
You missed one thing, I think.

content.situation: 店员在结账前核对顾客购买的衣物数量，确认是否齐全
content.speakerText: I've pulled everything from your order — let me confirm: two jackets, one sweater, and three pairs of socks?
content.speakerTextCn: 我已从您的订单中取出所有物品——让我确认一下：两件夹克、一件毛衣和三双袜子，对吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 确认信息并表达感谢的礼貌回应
